entities.name: Failed
entities.context: Status indicator (priority 100) representing thread/task errors or failures in V's knowledge system

entities.name: threads
entities.context: Context/domain where the Failed status applies - conversation or process threads

entities.name: tasks
entities.context: Context/domain where the Failed status applies - discrete work items

entities.name: system
entities.context: Context/domain where the Failed status applies - system-level operations

relationships.context: Failed status applies to threads context for detecting unresolved errors
Failed status applies to tasks context for detecting unsuccessful completions
Failed status applies to system context for detecting crashes or critical issues
